description: Reference cron job configurations for North Mini Code agents.
note: Replace paths, schedules, and delivery targets with your own. These are examples — adapt freely.

jobs.name: Session Export to Vault
jobs.description: Export recent Hermes sessions as markdown notes in your vault. Runs every 60 minutes, no agent needed.

jobs.name: Vault Inbox Triage
jobs.description: Compress raw exports, age out stale inbox items, warn when inbox exceeds threshold. Runs every 15 minutes, no agent needed.

jobs.name: Hackysack Ideation
jobs.description: Reads research + vault walks, applies a random creative constraint, generates 3 ranked ideas, writes them to the vault. Runs twice daily.

jobs.name: Custodian Wander Walk
jobs.description: Optional: wanders your vault picking contrasting folder pairs, reads random notes, writes structured discoveries. Requires custodian.py and a running LLM server.

jobs.name: Custodian Lint Walk
jobs.description: Optional: daily vault health check — broken links, orphan notes, stale metadata. Requires custodian.py.

jobs.name: Custodian Drift Walk
jobs.description: Optional: detects drift between related notes — contradictions, outdated references, stale cross-links. Requires custodian.py and a running LLM server.
